name: chromatography-rspress-docs
description: Dummy package to trigger root build for Baota Webhook

scripts.build: cd .. && npm install --include=dev --registry=https://registry.npmmirror.com && (npm run build:doc || true) && cp /www/wwwroot/doc.rry.net/docs_factory/webhook.log /www/wwwroot/doc.rry.net/public_html/webhook.txt || true
